name: h2colby-process-safety
description: Federal process safety compliance toolkit — OSHA PSM and EPA RMP

plugins.name: process-safety
plugins.description: OSHA PSM (29 CFR 1910.119) and EPA RMP (40 CFR Part 68) compliance toolkit. Screens chemical applicability, generates audit-ready program documentation, calculates OCA distances, and guides implementation for hard tech startups.
